opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I woke up freezing and shaking, and an hour later my face felt like it was burning. It hurts so much, and the redness is spreading toward my eyes.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Sudden high fever and shaking then a fast-spreading, burning red face.

symptom_narrative.onset: abrupt ~8 hours ago with fever/rigors, then facial redness
symptom_narrative.character: fiery red, hot, tight, very painful raised rash on the face
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: right cheek spreading across the nose to the left cheek, toward the eyes
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: high fever, chills/rigors, feeling very unwell; redness heading toward the eyes

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: usually well; no facial injury, dental or sinus problems

communication_style.typical_message_style: unwell, frightened by the spread toward the eyes

objective_data_offered.value: a bright fiery-red, hot, tender raised rash with a sharp advancing edge across both cheeks and the nose, spreading toward the eyes; the skin looks like orange peel
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: camera view; cannot examine eye movements, proptosis or palpate
